data.description:
## Why
runner.py is 829 LOC (over the 800 soft cap) and its filesystem/repo tooling is where the
workflow engine's git-ref snapshot code will land. Extract first to keep modules in policy.

## What
- Extract the fs/repo cluster (_safe_path, _git_tracked, _discovery_filter, _within_root,
  _filesystem_tools, caps constants, noise sets) from src/rebar/llm/runner.py into a new
  src/rebar/llm/fs_tools.py.
- Update docs/architecture.md offenders table (add runner.py; fix __init__.py count).

## Scope
- In: pure extraction, no behavior change; __init__.py split only if opportunistic.
- Out: new functionality (lands in WS-D); the snapshot/archive code (may split to snapshot.py).

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] fs cluster moved to llm/fs_tools.py; runner.py back under the soft cap.
- [ ] No behavior change; full test suite green.
- [ ] architecture.md offenders table + warn-CI baseline updated.
data.title: WS-A: Decompose runner.py (extract fs/repo cluster to llm/fs_tools.py)
